nasb.text: So you testify against yourselves, that you are sons of those who murdered the prophets.

esv.text: Thus you witness against yourselves that you are sons of those who murdered the prophets.

cnv.text: 這樣，你們就指證自己是殺害先知的人的子孫了。

ccb.text: 这样，你们自己证明自己是杀害先知之人的后代。

csbs.text: 这样，你们就见证了自己是杀害先知们的那些人的后代。
